title: Don't Start ANY Claude Code Project Until You Watch This
summary: Austin Marchese outlines 3 rules for successfully building projects with Claude Code, drawn from Y Combinator CEO Garry Tan's advice. The video covers what not to build, what to build, and 6 moves for leading an AI team, using a playbook that helped a non-technical founder scale an app to 400K+ annual revenue.
